song.title: Come and Rejoice with Me
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Come and rejoice with me! For once my heart was poor, And I have found a treasury Of love, a boundless store.
[V2] 2) Come and rejoice with me! I, once so sick at heart, Have met with One who knows my case, And knows the healing art.
[V3] 3) Come and rejoice with me! For I was wearied sore, And I have found a mighty arm Which holds me evermore.
[V4] 4) Come and rejoice with me! My feet so wide did roam, And One has brought me from afar, To find in Him my home.
[V5] 5) Come and rejoice with me! For I have found a Friend Who knows my heart’s most secret depths, Yet loves me without end.
[V6] 6) I knew not of His love, And He had loved so long, With love so faithful and so deep, So tender and so strong.
[V7] 7) And now I know it all, Have heard and known His voice And hear it still from day to day. Can I enough rejoice?
song.author: Elizabeth Rundle Charles
